conditions: 6 AM—Aww yeah. The stage is set, Jackson. Sunrise is upon us, and the day is dawning in a fantastic fashion. Bluebird skies are welcoming bright solar rays to come spend the day, so grab your gear and join the dramatic alpine play. Come prepared for a springy scene because things will heat up into the mid-20s at the summit and right around 40 in the valley. West winds will cool things off a tad as they blow between 5 and 15 mph at most elevations but gust near 40 at the summit. If life is feeling a bit over the top, just call it a week and head for the Village; your one-stop shop with endless crystal treats to pillage. - Lege
